title: PwC India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: PwC India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!
